steps.title: Link theory to naming
steps.content: Scientists explained combustion using phlogiston, and Ainsley's term "dephlogisticated air" uses that same framework. The second sentence needs a transition showing that the naming resulted from the theory.

steps.title: Choose a cause transition
steps.content: A would restate, C would present an alternative, and D would contrast. The needed relationship is consequence: because of the phlogiston theory, Ainsley used that name. The answer is B.
